channel.title: [Upcoming Online Events] - Building a React WordPress Theme using Frontity + Best Practices for Remote Teams
channel.description:
Hi everyone! :wave:
Just wanted to share the upcoming online talks that we are giving at the **[Mowomo Conference](https://mowomoevents.com/yomequedoencasa/)** this month, in case any of you is interested in joining us. :slight_smile:
They will be held in **Spanish**, recorded and available on **[Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/mowomo)**. You can [register for free here](https://mowomoevents.com/yomequedoencasa/inscribete-gratis/).
### 16th of April: Best Practices for Remote Teams
Our CEO and Frontity co-founder @Pablo will be sharing the main processes and tools that we use as a remote team. He will also explain all the lessons that we have learnt along our way of becoming a remote company. More information:
https://mowomoevents.com/yomequedoencasa/ponencia/best-practices-para-equipos-en-remoto/
### 20th of April: Building a React WordPress Theme using Frontity
In this online workshop, our DevRel team lead @juanma will show how to build a performant and SEO-friendly WordPress theme based on React using Frontity. More information:
https://mowomoevents.com/yomequedoencasa/ponencia/crea-un-tema-para-wordpress-con-react-con-frontity/
Feel free to reach out if you have any questions. :)

item.title: [Upcoming Online Events] - Building a React WordPress Theme using Frontity + Best Practices for Remote Teams
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi everyone!

Just wanted to share the upcoming online talks that we are giving at the Mowomo Conference this month, in case any of you is interested in joining us.

They will be held in Spanish, recorded and available on Youtube. You can register for free here.

16th of April: Best Practices for Remote Teams

Our CEO and Frontity co-founder @Pablo will be sharing the main processes and tools that we use as a remote team. He will also explain all the lessons that we have learnt along our way of becoming a remote company. More information:

#yomequedoencasa

Best Practices para equipos en remoto - #yomequedoencasa

Frontity es una startup formada por un equipo de 9 personas que trabajan desde 5 países, en 3 continentes y con 3 zonas horarias diferentes. En mi ponencia explicaré cuales han sido nuestros principales aprendizajes en el proceso de montar este...

20th of April: Building a React WordPress Theme using Frontity

In this online workshop, our DevRel team lead @juanma will show how to build a performant and SEO-friendly WordPress theme based on React using Frontity. More information:

#yomequedoencasa

Crea un tema para Wordpress con React (con Frontity) - #yomequedoencasa

¿Por qué hacer un tema con React? ¿Y qué beneficios tiene un tema hecho en React frente a un tema tradicional de PHP? ¿Qué es eso de Frontity? Tras una introducción a esta nueva forma de trabajar con WordPress (Headless WP) que se abre ante nosotros...

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

Read full topic
item.source: [Upcoming Online Events] - Building a React WordPress Theme using Frontity + Best Practices for Remote Teams
